cards.title: Orbital Debris
cards.flavor_text: What goes up must come down... eventually.
cards.art_prompt: Dramatic scene of glowing metallic space debris tumbling through low Earth orbit, Earth's blue atmosphere glowing below, lens flare from the sun, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, vibrant colors

cards.title: Rogue Satellite
cards.flavor_text: It stopped responding to commands three years ago.
cards.art_prompt: A derelict satellite with broken solar panels drifting through space, sparking electronics, stars in background, ominous purple nebula, photorealistic, dramatic lighting, high detail

cards.title: Solar Flare Shield
cards.flavor_text: The last line of defense against the storm.
cards.art_prompt: A futuristic hexagonal energy shield in space glowing bright orange and gold, deflecting a massive solar flare, spacecraft behind it, epic scale, photorealistic, vibrant warm colors
